name: Copen, the Luminous Avenger iX
description: The Luminous Avenger iX. Having failed in his crusade to prevent an Adept takeover, he has wandered the Earth for years, saving ordinary humans wherever he goes, aided in his weary quest only by his support droid, Lola. He wears special armor that allows him to fly, and his main method of combat is dashing into his foes to lock on to them, so his pistol, the Divider, can fire homing laser shots.
creator: Kai_Enjin
